name: ks_1_Y_loop_chrY
description: Drosophila Y-chromosome lampbrush loop: ks-1 (PpRY). ks-1 male fertility factor on short arm; smaller loop, function not fully resolved. Y-loops are transcribed in primary spermatocytes producing megabase-scale primary transcripts of which 99% is intronic satellite that is co-transcribed but never spliced into mRNA. Coordinates here cover the assembled euchromatic flanks; the loop interior itself is heterochromatin-only and largely absent from BDGP6.46.
expected_copy_count: 1 per haplotype (Y carriers only); intronic satellite arrays repeat 10^4-10^5 times
